## 📝 Description
Closes #

## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] 🚀 Feat (New feature)
- [ ] 🐛 Fix (Bug fix)
- [ ] 🧹 Chore (Build, dependencies, linting, etc.)
- [ ] 📚 Docs (Documentation changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Refactor (Code changes that neither fix a bug nor add a feature)

## 📋 Architectural Checklist
- [ ] Follows multi-module visibility rules (internal vs public API).
- [ ] Adheres to UDF (Unidirectional Data Flow) and MVI principles.
- [ ] Clean Architecture layers are strictly respected.
- [ ] No sihmirili/magic numbers left in technical layers (`core:ble`).

## 🧪 Quality & Testing
- [ ] Local Detekt check passed successfully (`./gradlew detekt`).
- [ ] Project builds fine locally (`./gradlew assembleDebug`).
- [ ] Tested on a physical device running Android 12+ (BLE).
